programme.title: Cut Amirah - EP 5
programme.desc: The drama 'Cut Amirah' starts with the background of the 2004 tsunami in Acheh, progressing to the year 2011. It revolves around the love story and agony of an orphan, Cut Amirah, an Acheh origin, who lost her whole family due to the tsunami which occurred on the very frightful evening at 4pm, 24 December 2004. The tsunami came carrying a horrifying 9 Richter magnitude scale.

programme.title: Tekan Minyak - EP 11

programme.title: Seindah Cinta Mutiara - EP 9

Despite her efforts, she faces one challenge after another, forcing her to become even stronger in order to endure. Surrounded by people who are cruel and hostile towards her, Mutiara’s journey seems relentless. Fortunately, she has a loyal friend in Dianda, who continuously supports and encourages her to persevere.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don't consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-11
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it's only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. programme.title: Wild Fed

programme.title: Yukon for Sale
programme.desc: British eccentrics Lou and Gary recently moved to the Yukon and are seeking space for livestock in the gold rush town of Dawson City.

programme.title: Yukon for Sale
programme.desc: Friends and bandmates Cindy and Drew look for a Yukon property with mountain views, rehearsal space and a workshop.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don't consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-11
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it's only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife

programme.title: Silver Linings Playbook
programme.desc: After spending eight months in a mental institution, a man tries to start a new life.

programme.title: Southpaw

programme.title: Stand Up Guys
programme.desc: A geriatric gangster's release from prison leads to a reunion with his two partners in crime, one of whom has orders to kill him.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: Julie Powell, a young blogger, is determined to emulate Julia Child's cooking techniques. Though separated by time, the two women share a common passion for food that intertwines their lives.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
programme.desc: A pregnant assassin, code-named The Bride, goes into a coma for four years after her ex-boss Bill brutally attacks her. When she wakes up, she sets out to get revenge against him and his associates.

programme.title: Nightcrawler
programme.desc: Louis Bloom, a petty thief, realises that he can make money by capturing photographs of crime scenes and starts resorting to extreme tactics to get them.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: Reginald's manager helps him rise to fame, but also creates chaos in his life.

programme.title: Gambler's Delight
programme.desc: A man lies, cheats and steals his way into operating a casino but when he incurs the wrath of a Japanese gang leader.

programme.title: Gossip Street
programme.desc: Regular Joes turn heroes to save their neighbourhood, when a local mobster decides to turn their local gossip spot into a gambling den!

programme.title: My Rebellious Son
programme.desc: Screen legend Alexander Fu plays a son who constantly challenges his father's patience and kung-fu skills until they are forced to fight together.

programme.title: Hong Kong Rhapsody
programme.desc: A follow-up to the previous blockbuster, this 60's musical features an unemployed magician whose love life is as twisted as his tricks.

programme.title: Shaolin Prince
programme.desc: A murdered emperor's two sons are raised apart but their paths eventually cross, and so do theirs with the imperial throne's usurper.

programme.title: The Enchanting Ghost
programme.desc: A cruel uncle stands in the way between a young scholar and the beautiful gal with whom he falls in love, and happiness.

programme.title: Roving Swordsman
programme.desc: The protector (Ti Lung) of the Pai clan's coveted secret martial arts manuscript also has to protect a Pai female who's under threat.

programme.title: Tragic Commitment
programme.desc: After a guilty Alex confesses his affair to Tung, his injured wife, she somehow ends up living with Alex's mother and his mistress under the same roof!

programme.title: That Man in Chang-an
programme.desc: Yan Jun stars in this romantic Han dynasty adventure epic as a dying emperor alongside an evil queen, amidst plots and counterplots galore!

programme.title: Diau Charn
programme.desc: Set in the Han Dynasty, this drama depicts the legendary beauty Diao Chan, and how she used her charms to help her godfather eradicate corrupt court officials.

programme.title: The Master
programme.desc: When Ko Chien, a downtrodden kung fu student seeks to save the life of a kung fu master and learn new skills, fate labels him a traitor instead.

programme.title: The Crimson Palm
programme.desc: Featuring the unforgettable song Country Road, Shaw's Huangmei Opera stars Ivy Ling Po and tells the tale of a poor student engaged to a billionaire's daughter.

programme.title: Moods of Love
programme.desc: How far would you go for love? Or lust? These are the questions posed in two, sinfully entertaining Sung Dynasty tales that comprise this film.

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: Superstars Ti Lung and David Keung team up for in this 71' classic about a young man who is exiled after his godfather's death, but returns with a vengeance.

programme.title: Village of Tigers

programme.title: The Shepherd Girl

programme.title: Executioners From Shaolin
programme.desc: A Shaolin hero and the vicious Pai Mei lock horns in this kungfu revenge tale that spans two generations.

programme.title: A Friend From Inner Space

programme.title: Judgement of an Assassin
programme.desc: This tale of the 100 Poison Clique's obsessive ambition to destroy all rivals climaxes in a bloody clash involving a mass murderer's trial.

programme.title: Hong Kong 73

programme.title: Trilogy of Swordsmanship

programme.title: All Men Are Brothers

programme.title: The Emperor and the Minister

programme.title: The Kid With the Golden Arm

programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 31
programme.desc: It tells the story of Cinta (Melayu Nicole Hall), who is caught in a complicated love triangle with Revan and Bayu, filled with action and comedy. Cinta is forced to marry Viko to save her adoptive mother, leading to a deeply difficult and emotional dilemma.

programme.title: ADA DUA CINTA EPS 37
programme.desc: It tells the story of two girls, Mecca (who comes from humble circumstances) and Medina (who is wealthy), who are connected through Ayu—Mecca's biological mother—who adopted Medina. Conflict arises when they both fall in love with the same man, creating an emotional romantic drama that tugs at the heartstrings.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 109
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. Her life is simple but full of color thanks to one thing she truly loves: cooking. For Lala, the kitchen is not just a place to prepare ingredients. It is a space for expression, a place where she pours out her emotions, wraps stories into every seasoning, and ser

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 20
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 97
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even tho

programme.title: KARENA AKU SAYANG 42
programme.desc: Kenzie is a man who has experienced countless traumatic events in his past. These experiences have shaped him into a perfectionist who often makes things difficult for those around him. One of them is Zara, his personal assistant, who constantly tries to cheer him up as he frequently experiences mood swings in various situations.

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 71-72
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. However, fate brings her together with Pasha, a respectable man from a wealthy family. Unbeknownst to them, they were actually switched at birth. What will happen to Adisty and Pasha's lives?
